gauge.name: Rocky Creek at highway 25/72 near Greenwood

impacts.statement: STAGE AT WHICH BRIDGES ON HALTIWANGER...US ROUTEE 25 AND NORTH SIDE DRIVEE WILL BE FLOODED.

STAGE AT WHICH SOME OF THE CREEKS THAT DRAIN INTO THIS CREEK WILL LIKELY BEGIN TO FLOOD.  Several of the parking lots for Fox Hollow Apartments will be inundated with several inches to as much as 3 feet of water.  This will move any parked vehicles in the affected parking lots by several feet or more.  Several first floor units for the Fox Hollow Apartments will be inundated with several inches to as much as 1 foot of water.

72 BYPASS WILL FLOOD IN LOW AREAS NEAR THE CREEK.  Up to one foot of water will inundate the parking lots for the Fox Hollow Apartments.  Water will begin to enter several units of the Fox Hollow Apartments.
Several inches of water will cover the parking lots for the Fox Hollow Apartments with enough force to move parked vehicles.
STAGE WATER REACHES BOTTOM OF BRIDGE ON COKESBURY ROAD.  Water will begin to flood portions of the parking lots for Fox Hollow Apartments.
HEAVY RAIN AND A RIVER LEVEL OF 7 FT DID NOT CAUSE SAMPLE CREEK WHICH IS A TRIB TO HEADWATER OF ROCKY CREEK TO FLOOD SAMPLE RD.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
